mapper.select: SELECT member_id FROM member WHERE member_email = #{memberEmail}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET member_pw = #{memberPw} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE member_email = #{memberEmail} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET member_nickname = #{memberNickname}, member_profile_img = #{memberProfileImg} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member
AND member_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND member_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (member_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR member_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, m.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM member
AND member_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND member_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (member_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR member_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY MEMBER_ENROLL_DATE DESC ) m ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{pageInfo.start} AND #{pageInfo.end}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET member_type = #{memberType} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
